landing.heroSubtitle: Sarathi ensures the right benefit reaches the right citizen at the right time — even if they cannot read, write, or use the internet.
landing.step1Desc: Tell us about yourself in your language — voice, text, or through a Panchayat official.
landing.step2Desc: Our AI maps your circumstances to 700+ welfare schemes and finds your optimal benefit bundle.
landing.step3Desc: We guide you through the application process and track your benefits to ensure delivery.
landing.stat1Desc: In benefits secured for previously excluded citizens
landing.stat4Desc: Citizen profiles supported at sub-3s response

eligibility.title: Check Your Eligibility
eligibility.subtitle: Answer a few questions to discover which welfare schemes you qualify for.
eligibility.name: Full Name
eligibility.consentText: I consent to Sarathi collecting and using my information to check welfare eligibility and assist with applications.

results.title: Your Welfare Opportunities
results.optimalDesc: This combination maximizes your total benefit without conflicts.

auth.citizenDesc: Check eligibility, discover schemes, track benefits

common.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
common.offline: You are offline. Some features may be limited.

innovations.twinDesc: Predicts your welfare trajectory for the next 5 years so you can prepare today.
innovations.conflictDesc: Game theory optimizes your benefit bundle, preventing costly mistakes.
innovations.zkpDesc: Proves your eligibility without revealing sensitive personal data.
innovations.offlineDesc: Works in remote areas with zero internet via Bluetooth data collection.
innovations.portabilityDesc: Benefits travel with migrant workers across state boundaries.
innovations.communityDesc: Citizens confirm delivery via missed call, creating a governance accountability index.
innovations.explainabilityDesc: Every eligibility decision explained in simple language in your language.
